description: Your Thunderbird mail folders are bloated with space from previously deleted messages. The Inbox and Junk folders contain 'ghost' data from emails you deleted in the past, but Thunderbird has not yet reclaimed that disk space. You can see the current folder sizes documented in the file on your Desktop (folder_sizes_before_compact.txt). Compact both the 'Inbox' and 'Junk' folders under Local Folders to reclaim the wasted disk space. Ensure all existing (non-deleted) emails remain accessible in both folders after the hidden remnants of previously deleted messages are purged.
